definition.name: sif_search
definition.description: Search SIF/Confluence documentation pages by text or CQL query. Returns page titles, IDs, and excerpts. Use this to find relevant pages before reading their full content.

query.description: Search text. Automatically wrapped in CQL for the configured space.

cql.description: Raw CQL for advanced searches. Overrides query if provided.

definition.name: sif_read_page
definition.description: Read the full content of a Confluence page by ID. Returns title and body as clean markdown. Use page IDs from search results.

page_id.description: Confluence page ID from search results

definition.name: sif_list_pages
definition.description: List all pages in a Confluence space. Returns page titles, IDs, and URLs.
